terms.definition: Initial large-scale training on text corpora to predict next tokens, building general language ability before assistant-specific tuning.
Training on curated prompt-response examples so the model follows instructions in a chat assistant format.
Reinforcement learning from human feedback—humans rank outputs and a reward model guides further training.
Reinforcement learning from AI feedback—models or rubrics critique outputs to scale alignment beyond human labels alone.
The approximate date boundary of information seen in pretraining; events after it are not reliably known unless provided via tools or prompts.
